name: 7'x10' Sheen Shag Area Rug - Threshold™
description:
Upgrade your indoor decor with this Sheen Shag Area Rug from Threshold™. The rectangular area rug features a shag exterior with a subtle sheen for a chic look that blends seamlessly with just about any existing decor. The recycled polyester fabric provides soft comfort underfoot, and the latex-blend backing helps keep it in place. Easy to clean, this medium-pile rug can be used to accent a wide variety of rooms.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
